Forget your Haaland and Mbappé goal numbers! 🤯
Back in the day, we had actual alien finishers.
Gerd Müller: 365 goals in 427 Bundesliga games. Just pure, predatory instinct.
Ferenc Puskas: 242 goals in 262 La Liga games. A left foot that defied physics.
One was the fox in the box, the other a thunderous magician. Both legendary, but who left a bigger mark? 👇

STOP THE DEBATE ABOUT MODERN STRIKERS! Rewind to the early 2000s: Henry vs Van Nistelrooy.

THIERRY HENRY: 4 PL Golden Boots, redefined the striker role with pace, power, and flair. A true artist.
Ruud Van Nistelrooy: A PURE penalty box assassin. 95 goals in 150 PL games – almost 2 goals every 3 games. A clinical killer.

One revolutionized the position, the other mastered goalscoring within the 18-yard box. Who truly terrorized defenders MORE? 👇 #PLClassics

Unbeaten at home? Try NINE YEARS! 🤯 Jose Mourinho's Porto, Chelsea, Inter, and Real Madrid teams went a combined 150 league games without a home defeat from 2002-2011. That's not just a run, that's a fortress built brick by brick across four clubs. The 'Special One' truly earned that title with home dominance! #Mourinho #History #Tactics
